# Survival72

> Professional-grade modular EDC tools engineered for 72-hour deployment. Pliers, wrench, axe and gift configurations. Ships across the GCC.

Survival72 designs and sells a modular Everyday Carry (EDC) system built around interchangeable tool modules — precision multi-pliers, a multi-function wrench and a tactical axe — packaged in magnetic gift boxes for individuals, corporate gifting and government procurement.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Brand overview and featured modules.
- [Shop the Kit](/shop-the-kit): Configure and order the modular Survival72 kit.
- [Gift Box](/products/gift-box): Premium magnetic gift box configurations.
- [About](/about): Company story, design philosophy and team.
- [Our Promise](/our-promise): Quality, warranty and service commitments.
- [Blog](/blog): Field guides, product deep-dives and survival education.
- [Wholesale & Procurement](/wholesale): Bulk orders for corporate and government buyers.
- [Corporate & Bespoke](/corporate-partnerships): Custom branding, engraved handles and bespoke editions (25+ units).
- [Military Discount](/military-discount): Verified discount program for active and veteran service members.
- [Contact](/contact): Support, sales and procurement contact details.

## Optional

- [Warranty](/warranty): Lifetime warranty terms.
- [Shipping Policy](/shipping-policy): Delivery times and regions.
- [Return Policy](/return-policy): Returns and refunds.
- [Cancellation Policy](/cancellation-policy): Order cancellation terms.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy-policy): Data and privacy practices.
- [Terms of Service](/terms-of-service): Site and purchase terms.
